title: Magic Pole Transition
result_description: You step across a central pole and your outfit instantly changes, hidden by a vertical split mask on the pole.

inputs.name: outfit_a_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot with a pole centered in frame: in your first outfit, take one simple step across the pole. Note your standing spot.

inputs.name: outfit_b_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Without moving the camera, change outfits, stand in the same spot, and take the same step across the pole.

capture_requirements.note: match the step path and timing of the first take

params.note: trim each clip down to the short step-across section
drop the second outfit onto an overlay track, dragged to the front so timing lines up

edit_steps.note: halve opacity to align the foot crossing the pole in both takes

params.note: slip the overlay frame-by-frame so the step crosses the pole at the same moment

edit_steps.note: rotate the split mask 90 degrees and center it on the pole
add a small feather (about 3) to hide the harsh line on the floor

result.description: Outfit swaps the instant you cross the pole, with no visible seam.
success_criteria: Step crosses the pole on the same frame in both halves
Split mask hidden inside the pole
Soft, non-harsh seam on the floor
